page.breadcrumbNav: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-[5%] pt-4 pb-2 overflow-x-auto
page.breadcrumbList: flex flex-nowrap items-center font-body text-[11px] tracking-[0.2em] text-[var(--mra-muted)] whitespace-nowrap min-w-0
page.main: product-page-minimal max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-[5%] py-4 md:py-6
page.galleryBox: relative bg-[var(--mra-surface)] overflow-hidden border border-[var(--mra-border)] rounded-2xl shadow-sm group
page.imageCounter: absolute bottom-3 right-3 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-sm bg-[var(--mra-text)]/80 text-[var(--mra-bg)] text-[11px] font-medium tracking-wide
page.navBtn: absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-[var(--mra-card)]/95 border border-[var(--mra-border)] opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:bg-[var(--mra-card)] text-[var(--mra-muted)] hover:text-[var(--mra-text)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--mra-text)] focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
page.navBtnNext: absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-[var(--mra-card)]/95 border border-[var(--mra-border)] opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:bg-[var(--mra-card)] text-[var(--mra-muted)] hover:text-[var(--mra-text)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--mra-text)] focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
page.thumbStrip: flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-1 pt-1 snap-x scrollbar-hide
page.thumbBtn: relative flex-none aspect-square w-24 overflow-hidden snap-start border-2 rounded-lg border-[var(--mra-border)] hover:border-[var(--mra-text)]/40 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--mra-text)] focus:ring-offset-2 bg-[var(--mra-surface)]
page.productInfo: space-y-3 relative lg:col-span-1 min-w-0 p-6 rounded-2xl bg-[var(--mra-surface)] border border-[var(--mra-border)]
page.productTitle: font-headline text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[var(--mra-text)] mb-1 uppercase
page.reviewRow: flex items-center gap-2 font-body text-sm text-[var(--mra-muted)]
page.descriptionSection: rounded-2xl bg-[var(--mra-card)] border border-[var(--mra-border)] overflow-hidden shadow-sm
page.descriptionHeaderTitle: font-headline text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[var(--mra-muted)] flex items-center gap-3
page.descriptionHeaderIcon: w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-[var(--mra-surface)] flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0
page.descriptionContentInner: rounded-lg bg-[var(--mra-bg)] border border-[var(--mra-border)] shadow-sm overflow-hidden
page.descriptionContent: prose prose-sm max-w-none overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 text-[var(--mra-muted)]
page.descriptionOverlay: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-24 pointer-events-none bg-gradient-to-t from-[var(--mra-card)] via-[var(--mra-card)]/90 to-transparent
page.showMoreBtn: font-body inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-[11px] font-medium tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[var(--mra-text)] hover:text-[var(--mra-accent-hover)] bg-[var(--mra-surface)] hover:bg-[var(--mra-border)]/50 px-5 py-2.5 rounded-sm border border-[var(--mra-border)] transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--mra-text)] focus:ring-offset-2
page.detailInfoBox: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-[var(--mra-card)] border border-[var(--mra-border)] shadow-sm border-l-4 border-l-[var(--mra-text)]/30
page.detailInfoIcon: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-[var(--mra-surface)] flex-shrink-0
page.relatedTitle: font-headline text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[var(--mra-text)] mb-4 uppercase
page.relatedCardRoot: group product-card flex flex-col h-full bg-[var(--mra-card)] rounded-md overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 border border-[var(--mra-border)] hover:border-[var(--mra-text)]/30
page.relatedCardMedia: relative aspect-[3/4] min-h-[200px] overflow-hidden bg-[var(--mra-surface)] flex items-center justify-center
page.relatedCardNoImageWrap: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-[var(--mra-surface)]
page.relatedCardSaleBadge: absolute top-2 left-2 bg-[var(--mra-text)] text-[var(--mra-bg)] text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm
page.relatedCardTitle: text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-[var(--mra-text)] group-hover:text-[var(--mra-accent-hover)] transition-colors line-clamp-2 leading-snug mb-2
page.relatedCardArrow: text-[var(--mra-muted)] group-hover:text-[var(--mra-text)] group-hover:translate-x-0.5 transition-all duration-200 flex-shrink-0
page.galleryColumnWrap: w-full min-w-0 lg:col-span-2 lg:sticky lg:top-24 lg:self-start
page.imageGridWrap: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 w-full min-w-0 lg:col-span-2 lg:sticky lg:top-24 lg:self-start
page.imageGridItem: relative w-full min-w-0 aspect-square overflow-hidden rounded border border-[var(--mra-border)] bg-[var(--mra-surface)]

addToCart.optionButton: min-w-[2.75rem] px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium border-2 border-[var(--mra-border)] bg-[var(--mra-surface)] text-[var(--mra-text)] hover:border-[var(--mra-text)]/50
addToCart.optionButtonSelected: min-w-[2.75rem] px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium bg-white border-2 border-white text-neutral-900
addToCart.quantityInput: w-14 text-center text-sm font-medium text-[var(--mra-text)] bg-transparent border-0 border-x border-[var(--mra-border)] py-2.5 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 [appearance:textfield] [&::-webkit-outer-spin-button]:appearance-none [&::-webkit-inner-spin-button]:appearance-none

luxuryProductStyle.title: font-headline text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[var(--mra-text)] mb-2 uppercase

related.title: font-headline text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[var(--mra-text)] mb-6 uppercase
